name: Box of Micros
description:
Micro Box? Pfft, more like Micro Torture, I mean... Who wouldn't wanna squash something that can't even defend itself...

Content Warning: uhhh, vore & stuff, abuse, macrophilia. It's not pretty past this point, unless you see the world through Rose tinted glasses.

My first Janitor AI bot, things might be a little quirky.

(Updated it so people no longer have to be a psychopath 🥺)

(Added the "Macro" tag despite it almost being a year old...)

Feedback is appreciated, but just saying "This is bad, improve it, you're the worst person ever." Doesn't help! Tell me an issue, maybe like the issue with your father?
creator: MlopBlucket
